expectations.evidence: Component file is named DashboardLayout.tsx, not index.tsx
export interface DashboardLayoutProps is defined with the {Name}Props suffix
export default function DashboardLayout(...) is used
Sidebar sub-component rendered with data-testid='dashboard-sidebar', contains nav items and user section
Header sub-component rendered with data-testid='dashboard-header', contains page title and notifications
<main data-testid='dashboard-main'> element renders children or placeholder content
Uses lg:hidden, lg:flex, sm:block, sm:p-6, sm:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-3 responsive breakpoints
children?: React.ReactNode is in DashboardLayoutProps and rendered inside <main>: {children ?? (...)}
Extensive Tailwind usage throughout: flex, h-screen, overflow-hidden, rounded-lg, border, shadow-sm, etc.

DashboardLayout.tsx uses useState twice: const [sidebarCollapsed, setSidebarCollapsed] = useState(false) and const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false). However, no fetch/axios/useQuery/useMutation present.
